name: tg-pilot-study-platform
description: Study platform for Thai Airways (TG) pilot recruitment prep: scores, weakest-first training priority, and shared PDF materials.

scripts.build:prod: npm run gen:prod-schema && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prod.prisma && next build
scripts.setup:prod: npm run gen:prod-schema && prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prod.prisma && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prod.prisma && tsx prisma/seed.ts
